ai_used_for_diagnostic_purposes.description: AI used for diagnosis or treatment recommendation based on patient's medical record

obligations.content: Artificial intelligence may be used only if the practitioner is acting within the scope of the practitioner's license, certification, or authorization.
The particular use of artificial intelligence must not be otherwise restricted or prohibited by state or federal law.
The practitioner must review all records created with artificial intelligence consistent with Texas Medical Board medical record standards.
The practitioner must disclose to the patient that artificial intelligence was used for diagnostic purposes.

notes: Applies only when AI is used for diagnosis or treatment recommendations based on a patient's medical record.
